_meta.note: Scores reflect the _stub_generate path (returns ideal reply verbatim) rated by _check_rule_based. The stub was NOT upgraded to a live LLM call in this environment because (a) the anthropic SDK is not installed in venv, and (b) no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is available to the sandbox. Rather than fake pass/fail numbers from a real model, we commit the stub-based output with a TODO(sprint7-phase7.2.8) marker in campaigns/services/eval_harness.py. The rule-based scorer is meaningful — it catches length / em-dash / signature / corporate-fluff violations — it is the upstream generator that is still stubbed. Real regression coverage will land when the Claude Code runtime provides API access (Phase 3 sprint work).
